# SpecTrace

> AI-readable bootstrap for the `spec-trace` reference repository. This file is non-authoritative. The canonical standard lives under [`./specs/requirements/spec-trace/`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/).

`spec-trace` is a JSON-first requirements and traceability standard. Canonical authored artifacts are `*.json`, and their document shape is validated by [`model/model.schema.json`](./model/model.schema.json).

When working in this repository:

- follow this authority order: canonical SPEC suite, then the authoritative JSON Schema and root JSON templates, then examples and generated outputs, then root summaries and AI convenience files
- keep requirements inside specification artifacts
- author canonical artifacts in JSON
- treat generated outputs as derived material
- use stable IDs for references and update referrers when an ID changes

## Canonical Standard

- [`_index.md`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/_index.md): entry point to the SPEC suite
- [`SPEC-STD.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-STD.json): core definitions, authority model, and publication rules
- [`SPEC-ID.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-ID.json): identifier policy
- [`SPEC-LIN.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-LIN.json): requirement lineage and evolution
- [`SPEC-PRF.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-PRF.json): repository conformance profiles
- [`SPEC-RPT.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-RPT.json): derived reporting dimensions and attestation semantics
- [`SPEC-LAY.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-LAY.json): repository layout guidance
- [`SPEC-TPL.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-TPL.json): canonical field model and requirement grammar
- [`SPEC-SCH.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-SCH.json): schema and validation rules
- [`SPEC-EVD.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-EVD.json): generated evidence snapshots
- [`SPEC-EXM.json`](./specs/requirements/spec-trace/SPEC-EXM.json): worked-example expectations

## Shared Model And Templates

- [`model/model.schema.json`](./model/model.schema.json): authoritative JSON Schema
- [`model/README.md`](./model/README.md): model notes
- [`spec-template.json`](./spec-template.json)
- [`architecture-template.json`](./architecture-template.json)
- [`work-item-template.json`](./work-item-template.json)
- [`verification-template.json`](./verification-template.json)
- [`catalog/retired-requirements.json`](./catalog/retired-requirements.json): retired requirement ledger for lineage validation

## Commands

- [`scripts/Test-SpecTraceRepository.ps1`](./scripts/Test-SpecTraceRepository.ps1): validate canonical JSON artifacts and repository-level integrity
- [`scripts/Build-SpecTraceCatalog.ps1`](./scripts/Build-SpecTraceCatalog.ps1): emit a repository-wide catalog as JSON
- [`scripts/Validate-SpecTraceEvidence.ps1`](./scripts/Validate-SpecTraceEvidence.ps1): validate evidence snapshots
- [`scripts/Render-SpecTraceAttestation.ps1`](./scripts/Render-SpecTraceAttestation.ps1): generate attestation output
- [`scripts/Sync-PublishModule.ps1`](./scripts/Sync-PublishModule.ps1): sync the curated publish mirror

## Worked Examples

- [`examples/README.md`](./examples/README.md): example index
- [`examples/payments/SPEC-PAY-ACH.json`](./examples/payments/SPEC-PAY-ACH.json): product-style example
- [`examples/calculator-int/SPEC-CALC-INT.json`](./examples/calculator-int/SPEC-CALC-INT.json): fuller technical example
- [`examples/arithmetic/SPEC-MATH-DIV.json`](./examples/arithmetic/SPEC-MATH-DIV.json): smallest end-to-end slice

## Compatibility Surfaces

- [`schemas/README.md`](./schemas/README.md): compatibility schema entry point
- [`artifact-id-policy.json`](./artifact-id-policy.json): compatibility identifier export

## AI Helpers

- [`AGENTS.md`](./AGENTS.md): repo-specific agent guide
- [`skills/README.md`](./skills/README.md): repo-local skill index
- [`artifact-model-explainer.md`](./artifact-model-explainer.md): plain-language artifact-family map
- [`profiles-and-attestation-explainer.md`](./profiles-and-attestation-explainer.md): plain-language profile and attestation guide
